TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Anasolay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 436 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 346 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 90 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 74%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Anasolay hya' ga Lupakatj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Anasolay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Anasolay ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč anas~…ēolaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu tajimari …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, tajan *%, ő≤unun *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na anas~…ēolaj ńßja Ē …£a lupakatj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč anas~…ēolaj …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo qalaŇč anas~…ēolaj …£a maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Anasolay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 436 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 346 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 90 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 74%, Tayan 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Anasolay hya' ga Lupakatj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Anasolay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Anasolay ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč anas~…ēolaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu tajimari …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, tajan *%, ő≤unun *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na anas~…ēolaj ńßja Ē …£a lupakatj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč anas~…ēolaj …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo qalaŇč anas~…ēolaj …£a maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
